title: Representation incumbents
description: Schema for shared/representation_incumbents.csv. Rows define the base-year incumbent method or incumbent method mix for each direct representation.

role_id.description: Role represented by the direct representation.

anchor_year.description: Base year for the incumbent method or mix.

method_id.description: Method identifier participating in the incumbent method or mix.

incumbent_share.description: Share of the representation incumbent mix for this method in the anchor year.
